title: Clothes For Continuance.
content:
Those garments lasting evermore,
    Are works of mercy to the poor,
    Which neither tettar, time, or moth
    Shall fray that silk or fret this cloth.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Clothes For Continuance."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
